files.title: Access Control Policy
files.description: Defines requirements for user access management, authentication, and authorization controls.

files.title: Incident Response Policy
files.description: Outlines procedures for detecting, reporting, and responding to security incidents.

files.title: Configuration Management Policy
files.description: Establishes baseline configurations and change control procedures for system components.

files.title: VDR Schema
files.description: JSON Schema for Vulnerability Detection and Response reports (draft/2020-12).

files.title: OAR Schema
files.description: JSON Schema for Ongoing Authorization Reports (draft/2020-12).

files.title: SCN Schema
files.description: JSON Schema for Significant Change Notifications (draft/2020-12).

files.title: Vulnerability Detection and Response Report
files.description: Machine-readable VDR report with live production vulnerability data.

files.title: Ongoing Authorization Report
files.description: Machine-readable OAR with quarterly compliance data.

files.title: Significant Change Notification
files.description: Sample SCN report for change notification framework.

files.title: Quarterly Authorization Review
files.description: Machine-readable QAR with quarterly review data.

files.title: Report Generation Manifest
files.description: Metadata for all generated reports including FRR requirements and validation status.

files.title: Next Report Date
files.description: Scheduled dates for next ongoing report and quarterly review.

files.title: Assessment Manifest
files.description: Metadata for 3PAO assessment documents including assessor, date, and result.

files.title: 3PAO Assessment Report
files.description: Third-party assessment organization security assessment report.

files.title: Authorization Letter
files.description: FedRAMP authorization letter from the authorizing official.
